description: Classification taxonomy for the garage control plane. All enums used in contracts and audit rules are defined here. Single source of truth for valid values.

descriptions.audit: Read-only evaluation of repo state against doctrine. No file modifications permitted.
descriptions.refactor: Structural reorganization within existing boundaries. No new capabilities added.
descriptions.build: New capability construction within declared scope. May create new files.
descriptions.migrate: Schema or data migration. Requires schema_impact=true. Triggers CTB validation gates.

descriptions.PASS: Work packet executed within scope, all acceptance criteria met, doctrine compliant.
descriptions.FAIL_EXECUTION: Work packet scoped correctly but implementation is incorrect or incomplete.
descriptions.FAIL_SCOPE: Work packet execution violated scope boundaries, modified protected assets, or breached envelope constraints.

descriptions.PASS: All gates passed. Certification artifact is merge-eligible.
descriptions.FAIL: One or more gates failed. Merge blocked.

descriptions.sovereign: imo-creator. Defines doctrine. Garage owner. All governance originates here.
descriptions.hub: Domain-owning child repo. Conforms to imo-creator doctrine. Receives certification.
descriptions.spoke: Interface-only boundary. No logic, no state, no tools. Data carrier only.

descriptions.planner: Generates WORK_PACKET from user intent. No code execution. No scope expansion.
descriptions.worker: Executes approved WORK_PACKET against mounted repo. Produces artifacts. Formerly named Builder.
descriptions.auditor: Evaluates execution against doctrine registry and audit rules. Issues classification. Feeds certification.
descriptions.db_agent: Database governance specialist. CTB validation, schema verification, migration audit, drift detection.

descriptions.BLOCKING: Halts certification. Must be resolved before any forward progress.
descriptions.HIGH: Fails certification but does not halt pipeline. Must be resolved before merge.
descriptions.MEDIUM: Warning. Documented in certification. Does not block merge.
descriptions.LOW: Informational. Logged for audit trail only.

descriptions.SPINE: Constitutional identity tables — sovereign IDs, hub IDs, entity anchors. INSERT-only after creation. Never UPDATE or DELETE.
descriptions.STATE: Current operational state — what is true right now. UPDATE permitted. Represents present reality.
descriptions.EVENT: Immutable audit log — what happened and when. INSERT-only. Never UPDATE or DELETE. The system's memory.
descriptions.CONFIG: System configuration — rules, thresholds, parameters. UPDATE permitted with ADR.
descriptions.CACHE: Derived or computed data — can be rebuilt from source. Truncate and rebuild permitted.

table_classifications.note: The master ERROR table is classified as EVENT. Every fault record is INSERT-only. Unclassified tables are a CRITICAL violation (PSB-CONST-001 Part IV).

garage_exclusive_artifacts.description: Artifacts that must reside in the Garage (imo-creator) only. Child repos must not contain these.
